EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITime2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that control the Time.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("30EAE8E1-26B2-4E57-A3F2-8AE7C7DB2455")]
public interface ITime2 : ITime

Properties

Day 

short Day { get; set; }

Property Value

short

DayOfWeek

The day number of the week, starting with 1 for Sunday.

short DayOfWeek { get; }

Property Value

short

Examples

Sample Snippet

DayOfYear

The day number of the year, starting with 1 for the first day of the year.

short DayOfYear { get; }

Property Value

short

Examples

Sample Snippet

Hour 

short Hour { get; set; }

Property Value

short

Minute 

short Minute { get; set; }

Property Value

short

Month 

short Month { get; set; }

Property Value

short

Nanoseconds 

int Nanoseconds { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Second 

short Second { get; set; }

Property Value

short

WeekOfMonth[short]

The week number of the month, starting with 1 for the first week of the month. Use startDayOfWeek = 1 to specify that weeks start on Sunday, and 2 on Monday.

short WeekOfMonth[short startDayOfWeek] { get; }

Parameters

startDayOfWeek short

Property Value

short

Examples

Sample Snippet

WeekOfYear[short]

The week number of the year, starting with 1 for first week of the year. Use startDayOfWeek = 1 to specify that weeks start on Sunday, and 2 on Monday.

short WeekOfYear[short startDayOfWeek] { get; }

Parameters

startDayOfWeek short

Property Value

short

Examples

Sample Snippet

short Year { get; set; }

short
